message:
chore: reorder imports alphabetically and reformat assertion expressions

- Sort import statements alphabetically in messages.rs and search.rs
  (ftui::widgets::Widget, StatefulWidget, DbConn, action menu entries)
- Expand ternary-style if/else in colorize_json_body for readability
- Reformat multi-line assert! expressions for consistent trailing style
- Add tests/conformance/fixtures/tool_descriptions.json test fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
